data.title: Crypto Capital Is Rewriting How Property Deals Happen in Europe
data.description:
Hundreds of high-net-worth investors are increasingly using cryptocurrency to purchase real estate across Europe, as new legal and financial frameworks make these transactions compliant, faster, and more accessible. What was once a niche experiment has evolved into a structured market supported by regulated fintech firms and legal specialists.
source: https://www.ethnews.com/crypto-capital-is-rewriting-how-property-deals-happen-in-europe/

data.title: No more hidden tracking: China unveils strict app privacy regulations
data.description:
A major step forward in the nation’s efforts to regulate how internet businesses handle personal data was taken on Saturday when Chinese officials unveiled draft legislation that would require mobile applications to obtain express consent before collecting user data. China‘s Cyberspace Administration published the proposed “Network Data Security Management Regulations,” which outline exactly how applications […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/china-unveils-strict-app-privacy-regulations/

data.title: Five-euro notes help Europol uncover Çopja group’s crypto laundering network
data.description:

source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/five-euro-europol-copja-crypto-laundering/

data.title: Long-Term Bitcoin Holders Enter Distribution Phase, Signaling Structural Supply Shift
data.description:
Recent on-chain data shared by CryptoQuant shows a clear change in Bitcoin’s supply dynamics, as long-term holders (LTHs) move into sustained distribution. The data suggests Bitcoin is transitioning from a scarcity-driven expansion phase toward a more balanced, two-sided market structure.
source: https://www.ethnews.com/long-term-bitcoin-holders-enter-distribution-phase-signaling-structural-supply-shift/
